mode: rule
tproxy-port: 7894
ipv6: false
log-level: silent
allow-lan: false
unified-delay: true
tcp-concurrent: true
external-controller: 0.0.0.0:9090
external-ui: ./zash
external-ui-url: https://github.com/Zephyruso/zashboard/releases/latest/download/dist-no-fonts.zip

dns:
  enable: true
  listen: 127.0.0.1:7874
  ipv6: false
  fake-ip-range: 198.18.0.0/15
  default-nameserver:
    - 1.1.1.1 # Поменять на свой DNS если не работает!!!
  nameserver:
    - https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query
  fake-ip-filter-mode: whitelist
  fake-ip-filter:
    - "*.lan"
    - "*.localdomain"
    - '+.ru'
    - '+.рф'
    - '+.su'
    - '+.ya.ru'
    - '+.yandex.ru'
    - '+.dzen.ru'

keep-alive-idle: 15
keep-alive-interval: 15

profile:
  store-selected: true
  store-fake-ip: true
  tracing: false

routing-mark: 2

sniffer:
  enable: true
  force-dns-mapping: true
  parse-pure-ip: true
  sniff:
    HTTP:
      ports:
        - 80
        - 8080-8880
      override-destination: true
    TLS:
      ports:
        - 443
        - 8443
  skip-domain:
    - Mijia Cloud
    - +.lan
    - +.local
    - +.push.apple.com
    - +.apple.com
    - +.msftconnecttest.com
    - +.3gppnetwork
  
proxy-groups:
  
  - name: Amnezia
    type: url-test
    proxies:
      - Awg1
      - Awg2
      - Awg3
      - Awg4
      - Awg5
      - Awg6
      - Awg7
      - Awg8
      - Awg9
      - Awg10
    url: 'http://speed.cloudflare.com'
    interval: 180
    lazy: true
    icon: https://www.vectorlogo.zone/logos/cloudflare/cloudflare-icon.svg
  
  - name: Proxy
    type: fallback
    use:
      - igareck
      - igareckbl
      - white-cidr
      - openproxy
    url: 'https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204'
    interval: 180
    lazy: true
    timeout: 5000
    filter: "🇨🇿|🇪🇪|🇫🇮|🇭🇺|🇮🇹|🇱🇻|🇳🇱|🇳🇴|🇵🇱|🇸🇪"
    expected-status: 204
    icon: https://www.vectorlogo.zone/logos/github/github-tile.svg
    
  - name: Hocku
    type: fallback
    use:
      - igareck
      - igareckbl
      - white-cidr
      - openproxy
    url: 'https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204'
    interval: 180
    lazy: true
    timeout: 5000
    filter: "🇫🇷|🇬🇧|🇨🇾|🇹🇷"
    expected-status: 204
    
  - name: Gemini
    type: fallback
    use:
      - igareck
      - igareckbl
      - white-cidr
      - openproxy
    url: 'https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204'
    interval: 180
    lazy: true
    timeout: 5000
    filter: "🇺🇸"
    expected-status: 204
    
  - name: Deutschland
    type: url-test
    use:
      - igareck
      - igareckbl
      - white-cidr
      - openproxy
    url: 'https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204'
    interval: 180
    lazy: true
    timeout: 5000
    filter: "🇩🇪"
    expected-status: 204

  - name: Russia
    type: url-test
    use:
      - igareck
      - igareckbl
      - white-cidr
      - openproxy
    url: 'https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204'
    interval: 180
    lazy: true
    timeout: 5000
    filter: "🇷🇺"
    expected-status: 204
    
proxy-providers:

  igareck:
    type: http
    url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/igareck/vpn-configs-for-russia/refs/heads/main/Vless-Reality-White-Lists-Rus-Mobile.txt
    interval: 3600
  igareckbl:
    type: http
    url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/igareck/vpn-configs-for-russia/refs/heads/main/BLACK_VLESS_RUS.txt
    interval: 3600
  white-cidr:
    type: http
    url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/igareck/vpn-configs-for-russia/refs/heads/main/WHITE-CIDR-RU-checked.txt
    interval: 3600
  openproxy:
    type: http
    url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/roosterkid/openproxylist/refs/heads/main/V2RAY_RAW.txt
    interval: 3600

proxies:
  - name: "Awg1"
    type: wireguard
    private-key: 0EApDsepBSyC9U4SeuWEmcK8vH7HSO86XlLhk6NbCHA=
    server: 162.159.195.1
    port: 2506
    ip: 172.16.0.2
    ipv6: fd01:5ca1:ab1e:80fa:ab85:6eea:213f:f4a5
    public-key: bmXOC+F1FxEMF9dyiK2H5/1SUtzH0JuVo51h2wPfgyo=
    allowed-ips: ['0.0.0.0/0']
    udp: true
    mtu: 1280
    remote-dns-resolve: true
    dns: [ 1.1.1.1, 1.0.0.1 ]
    amnezia-wg-option:
       jc: 4
       jmin: 40
       jmax: 70
       s1: 0
       s2: 0

       h2: 2
       h3: 3

rule-providers:
  
  block:
    behavior: domain
    type: http
    format: text
    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/itdoginfo/allow-domains/refs/heads/main/Categories/block.lst"
    interval: 86400
    path: ./ruleset/block.yaml

  discord-domain:
    behavior: classical
    type: http
    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fildunsky/clash_discord/refs/heads/main/discord-domain.yaml"
    interval: 86400
    path: ./ruleset/discord-domain.yaml
  
  discord-ip:
    behavior: classical
    type: http
    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fildunsky/clash_discord/refs/heads/main/discord-ip.yaml"
    interval: 86400
    path: ./ruleset/discord-ip.yaml

  facebook:
    behavior: classical
    type: http
    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/blackmatrix7/ios_rule_script/master/rule/Clash/Facebook/Facebook.yaml"
    interval: 86400
    path: ./ruleset/facebook.yaml
  
  gemini:
    behavior: classical
    type: http
    format: yaml
    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/blackmatrix7/ios_rule_script/master/rule/Clash/Gemini/Gemini.yaml"
    interval: 86400
    path: ./ruleset/gemini.yaml
  
  geoblock:
    behavior: domain
    type: http 
    format: text
    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/itdoginfo/allow-domains/refs/heads/main/Categories/geoblock.lst"
    interval: 86400
    path: ./ruleset/geoblock.yaml
 
  instagram:
    behavior: classical
    type: http
    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/blackmatrix7/ios_rule_script/master/rule/Clash/Instagram/Instagram.yaml"
    interval: 86400
    path: ./ruleset/instagram.yaml
  
  openai:
    behavior: classical
    type: http
    format: yaml
    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/blackmatrix7/ios_rule_script/refs/heads/master/rule/Clash/OpenAI/OpenAI.yaml"
    interval: 86400
    path: ./ruleset/openai.yaml
  
  ru-blocked:
    behavior: domain
    type: http
    format: text
    url: "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/shvchk/unblock-net/lists/clash/ru-blocked"
    interval: 86400
    path: ./ruleset/ru-blocked.yaml

  ru-inside:
    behavior: domain
    type: http 
    format: text
    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/itdoginfo/allow-domains/main/Russia/inside-clashx.lst"
    interval: 86400
    path: ./ruleset/ru-inside.yaml

  telegram:
    behavior: ipcidr
    type: http
    format: text
    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/123jjck/cdn-ip-ranges/refs/heads/main/telegram/telegram_plain_ipv4.txt"
    interval: 86400
    path: ./ruleset/telegram.yaml

  whatsapp:
    behavior: classical
    type: http
    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/blackmatrix7/ios_rule_script/refs/heads/master/rule/Clash/Whatsapp/Whatsapp.yaml"
    interval: 86400
    path: ./ruleset/whatsapp.yaml
  
  whitelist:
    behavior: domain
    format: text
    type: http
    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hxehex/russia-mobile-internet-whitelist/refs/heads/main/whitelist.txt"    
    interval: 86400
    path: ./ruleset/whitelist.yaml

  youtube:
    behavior: classical
    type: http
    url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/blackmatrix7/ios_rule_script/master/rule/Clash/YouTube/YouTube.yaml"
    interval: 86400
    path: ./ruleset/youtube.yaml

rules:

  - DOMAIN-SUFFIX,3gppnetwork.org,DIRECT
  - DOMAIN-SUFFIX,dzen.ru,DIRECT
  - DOMAIN-SUFFIX,yandex.ru,DIRECT
  - DOMAIN-SUFFIX,google.com,DIRECT
  - RULE-SET,ru-inside,Proxy
  - RULE-SET,whitelist,DIRECT
  - RULE-SET,block,Hocku
  - RULE-SET,geoblock,Hocku
  - RULE-SET,ru-blocked,Proxy
  - RULE-SET,instagram,Amnezia
  - RULE-SET,facebook,Amnezia
  - RULE-SET,youtube,Amnezia
  - RULE-SET,discord-domain,Proxy
  - RULE-SET,discord-ip,Proxy
  - RULE-SET,whatsapp,Amnezia
  - RULE-SET,openai,Proxy
  - RULE-SET,gemini,Gemini
# - RULE-SET,telegram,Amnezia,no-resolve
  - RULE-SET,telegram,Proxy
  - MATCH,DIRECT
